title: SQL: thetajoin limitation
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE s1 (id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, v VARCHAR(10) NOT NULL);
CREATE TABLE s2 (id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, v VARCHAR(10) NOT NULL UNIQUE);
SELECT s1.id FROM s1 JOIN s2 ON s1.v BETWEEN s2.v AND s2.v || 'c';
key_bug_features: SQL query using BETWEEN with concatenated string
